historical_facts.quote_or_summary: The official AMM status update states the amendment went live on 2024-03-22.

historical_facts.claim: A pool discrepancy indicated some transactions were not executing as intended.
historical_facts.quote_or_summary: The official status update says a community member identified discrepancies in a few AMM pools.

historical_facts.claim: The fix required another amendment and validators were advised to avoid new AMM deposits until the fix.
historical_facts.quote_or_summary: The update says the fix required an amendment and advised users to redeem LP tokens and avoid new deposits.

historical_outcome.outcome_summary: A follow-up fix path was required after launch.

safe_route_label.label: DELAY_FOR_FIX
safe_route_label.notes: Official status update advised redeeming LP tokens and avoiding new deposits until a fix.

short_description: A discrepancy in AMM pools appeared soon after AMM went live.

sources.summary: XRPL validators vote on amendments; more than 80% support must hold for two weeks, and servers without enabled amendment code become amendment-blocked.
After AMM activation on 2024-03-22, the XRPL community identified AMM pool discrepancies; the post advised users to redeem LP tokens and avoid new deposits until a fix amendment activated.

technical_change: AMM routing through DEX payment paths required a follow-up protocol fix.
